text:
{
  "componentId": "rf__node-person",
  "targetTag": "svg",
  "testIdsInPath": [
    "rf__node-person",
    "rf__wrapper",
    "canvas"
  ],
  "text": "Alice⊂Choose a term...",
  "ariaRole": "combobox",
  "button": 0
}

handlerCode: {(val) => { offeredTerm = val }}
{() => { if (offeredTerm !== '') { pulseEdges = ['delegates personal agency', 'proffers', 'evaluates', 'delegates to', 'verifies agreement']; pulseStep = 0; pulseActive = true } }}

text:
[
  "state:changes",
  {
    "uid": "",
    "eventName": "didChange",
    "componentType": "ChangeListener",
    "componentLabel": "",
    "changes": [
      {
        "path": "pulseEdges",
        "action": "set",
        "previousValue": [],
        "newValue": [
          "delegates personal agency",
          "proffers",
          "evaluates",
          "delegates to",
          "verifies agreement"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "diff": [
      {
        "path": "pulseEdges",
        "type": "update",
        "before": "[Circular]",
        "after": "[Circular]",
        "beforeJson": "[]",
        "afterJson": "[\n  \"delegates personal agency\",\n  \"proffers\",\n  \"evaluates\",\n  \"delegates to\",\n  \"verifies agreement\"\n]",
        "diffText": "path: pulseEdges\n- []\n+ [\n  \"delegates personal agency\",\n  \"proffers\",\n  \"evaluates\",\n  \"delegates to\",\n  \"verifies agreement\"\n]",
        "diffPretty": "path: pulseEdges\n- []\n+ [\n+   \"delegates personal agency\",\n+   \"proffers\",\n+   \"evaluates\",\n+   \"delegates to\",\n+   \"verifies agreement\"\n+ ]"
      }
    ]
  }
]
diffPretty:
path: pulseEdges
- []
+ [
+   "delegates personal agency",
+   "proffers",
+   "evaluates",
+   "delegates to",
+   "verifies agreement"
+ ]

text:
[
  "handler:complete",
  {
    "uid": "",
    "eventName": "didChange",
    "componentType": "ChangeListener",
    "componentLabel": "",
    "duration": 93.70000000298023,
    "startPerfTs": 9923,
    "ownerFileId": "http://localhost:8000/components/ReactFlowPage.xmlui",
    "ownerSource": {
      "start": 2849,
      "end": 3091
    },
    "handlerCode": "{() => { if (offeredTerm !== '') { pulseEdges = ['delegates personal agency', 'proffers', 'evaluates', 'delegates to', 'verifies agreement']; pulseStep = 0; pulseActive = true } }}",
    "traceId": "i-mnkztqub-ka4amz"
  }
]
handlerCode: {() => { if (offeredTerm !== '') { pulseEdges = ['delegates personal agency', 'proffers', 'evaluates', 'delegates to', 'verifies agreement']; pulseStep = 0; pulseActive = true } }}

{() => { if (pulseStep < pulseEdges.length) { pulseCurrentEdge = pulseEdges[pulseStep]; canvas.pulseEdge(pulseEdges[pulseStep], 1200); pulseStep = pulseStep + 1 } else { pulseActive = false; canvas.clearPulse() } }}

{() => { if (pulseCurrentEdge === 'evaluates' && offeredTerm !== '') { agreementDecision = (kleindorfersTerms.find(function(t) { return t.terms === offeredTerm }) && kleindorfersTerms.find(function(t) { return t.terms === offeredTerm }).policy === 'Accept') ? 'yes' : 'no' } if (pulseCurrentEdge === 'verifies agreement' && agreementDecision !== '') { kleindorfersTerms = kleindorfersTerms.map(function(t) { return t.terms === offeredTerm ? { terms: t.terms, policy: agreementDecision === 'yes' ? 'Accept' : 'Reject' } : t }); aliceDataStore = [...aliceDataStore, makeStoreEntry(offeredTerm + ' (' + (agreementDecision === 'yes' ? 'accepted' : 'rejected') + ')', 'Kleindorfers')]; kleindorfersDataStore = [...kleindorfersDataStore, makeStoreEntry(offeredTerm + ' (' + (agreementDecision === 'yes' ? 'accepted' : 'rejected') + ')', 'Alice')]; if (agreementDecision === 'yes') { acceptedCount = acceptedCount + 1; canvas.addEdge('e-signed-' + acceptedCount, 'person', 'entity-agent', 'right-magnet', 'left-magnet', 'signed: ' + offeredTerm + ' ⊂⊃', true) } } }}
